title: 宝塚記念の後に・声援の成分

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
(Heh-heh, they cheered me on from start to
finish. Though I struggle to comprehend why, I
find it deeply fascinating!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In reply, a shriek can be heard from somewhere in
the stands.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
During the race, I listened in to the crowd and I
could make out a few cheers here and there. And
guess what?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The data doesn't lie—the relationship between
cheering and muscular exertion proved
significant! I'm rather shocked, to be honest!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: It seems my emotions can be stimulated by both internal and external factors! I am but a social animal, after all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think what she means to say is the crowd's
cheering motivated her.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
All that's left this year are the autumn Tenno Sho
and the Arima Kinen! Time is aplenty!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
This is one small step closer to breaking the limits
of Umamusume-kind—to fulfilling my dream!
